title: sorbus japonica
intro: Sorbus japonica, also known as Japanese rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to East Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against oxidative stress. The bark, leaves, and berries of the Sorbus japonica plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being, and may be beneficial in reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting digestive health.
